summary: Frontend UI testing of streamlined multi-pet onboarding flow (MiraMeetsYourPet.jsx). Tested all 5 screens with 2 pets. All core features working correctly.

issues: Car rides buttons 'Anxious' and 'Okay' don't show colored selected state (red/amber) - only 'Loves it!' (green) shows proper color. This is due to Tailwind CSS not supporting dynamic class names like `bg-${opt.color}-500/20`. Functionality works correctly, just visual feedback missing.

test_results.screen1_pet_count_heading: PASS - 'How many furry friends do you have?' visible
test_results.screen1_buttons_1_to_8: PASS - 8 pet count buttons (1-8) present and clickable
test_results.screen1_lets_go_button: PASS - 'Let's Go!' button transitions to Screen 2
test_results.screen2_shows_pet_cards: PASS - Shows 'Pet 1 of 2' and 'Pet 2 of 2' cards
test_results.screen2_name_input: PASS - Name input works for both pets
test_results.screen2_avatar_selection: PASS - 33 breed avatars visible (66 total for 2 pets), selection works with visual indicator
test_results.screen2_photo_upload_button: PASS - 'Upload Photo' button present for both pets
test_results.screen2_gender_boy_girl: PASS - Boy/Girl buttons work with proper selected state styling
test_results.screen2_birthday_type_radios: PASS - All 3 options present (exact birthday, gotcha day, approximately)
test_results.screen2_approximate_age_dropdown: PASS - Dropdown with age options works
test_results.screen2_validation: PASS - Prevents continue without required fields with proper error messages
test_results.screen3_soul_snapshot_heading: PASS - 'A few quick questions' heading visible
test_results.screen3_pet_names_avatars: PASS - Both pet names and avatars displayed
test_results.screen3_allergies_toggle: PASS - 'None known'/'Yes' toggle works, detail input appears on 'Yes'
test_results.screen3_food_preference_dropdowns: PASS - Favorite protein and eating style dropdowns work
test_results.screen3_car_rides_buttons: PASS - Anxious/Okay/Loves buttons functional (styling issue noted)
test_results.screen3_activity_level_buttons: PASS - Couch Potato/Moderate/Very Active buttons work with proper purple selected state
test_results.screen4_parent_form_name: PASS - Name input field present and works
test_results.screen4_parent_form_email: PASS - Email input field present and works
test_results.screen4_parent_form_phone: PASS - Phone input field present and works
test_results.screen4_parent_form_city: PASS - City dropdown with Indian cities works
test_results.screen4_parent_form_password: PASS - Password input field present and works
test_results.screen4_whatsapp_checkbox: PASS - WhatsApp opt-in checkbox toggles correctly (default checked)

action_items: Fix car rides button styling - use static Tailwind classes instead of dynamic `bg-${opt.color}-500/20` (e.g., define explicit classes for each option)
critical_code_review_comments: Line 770-774: Dynamic Tailwind class names like `bg-${opt.color}-500/20` don't work at runtime. Tailwind purges unused classes at build time. Fix by using explicit conditional classes or defining all color variants in safelist.
context_for_next_testing_agent: New streamlined onboarding flow at /join with 5 screens: Pet Count, Meet Your Pack (basic info for all pets on one screen), Soul Snapshot (5 pillar questions for all pets), Parent Info, Welcome. All core functionality working. Minor styling issue with car rides button colors. API submission not tested - focus was on UI flow.
